mapper.select: SELECT w.wish_id, w.user_id, w.book_id, w.wish_date, b.book_title, b.book_author, b.book_image_url FROM wish w JOIN book b ON w.book_id = b.book_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.wish_date DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wish w JOIN user u ON w.user_id = u.user_id WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND u.user_status = 'active'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM wish WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId}
